no-restricted-syntax.message: [autolayout SoT] Use useScreenMetrics() — single subscriber via ClientProviders.subscribeToDeviceMetrics. See docs/Architecture/SCREEN_METRICS.md §6.4.
[autolayout SoT] Use useScreenMetrics().orientation or [data-orientation] CSS selector. See docs/Architecture/SCREEN_METRICS.md.
[autolayout SoT] Use useScreenMetrics().width or var(--screen-width). Direct window.innerWidth differs from Flutter MediaQuery — see docs/Architecture/SCREEN_METRICS.md §6.2.
[autolayout SoT] Use useScreenMetrics().height or var(--screen-height). See docs/Architecture/SCREEN_METRICS.md §6.2.
